name: Fried Shrimp Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp by cleaning them thoroughly, removing the shell, legs, and deveining.
2. Mince the shrimp.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except the oil.
4. Use a teaspoon of the mixture to shape into balls.
5. Heat the oil in a deep pot or skillet.
6. Deep fry the shrimp balls until they are golden brown.
7. Remove from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
8. Serve hot.
